secretSanta.description: Secret Santa is a draw where each person is randomly assigned another participant, and they prepare a gift for them, so nobody knows who got whom.
secretSanta.infoDescription: This section is intended for groups of 2 or more people, and lets them organize a Secret Santa.
secretSanta.emptyTitle: No Secret Santa has been organized in this group yet.
secretSanta.emptyAdminMessage: You can create one and decide which participants to include, whether to add exclusions, and other details.
secretSanta.emptyNonAdminMessage: The group admin can create one.
